transcript.text: Hi there! I'm your Launchpad immigration advisor, and I'm here to help you navigate whatever visa or immigration challenge you're facing. What's your name and what's your company called?
My name is Abdul Majid, and my company's name is Modibo.
Nice to meet you, Abdul. What stage is Modibo at right now - are you pre-seed, seed, or further along?
Yeah. I'm currently at pre seat.
Got it, pre-seed stage. What's your nationality, and what visa status do you currently have in the US?
My nationality is Nigerian, and
I currently live in Nigeria. I have any status
I understand - you're in Nigeria without any current US visa status. What's the immigration challenge you're facing right now that brought you to Launchpad?
I am looking to migrate.
What type of visa are you looking to get to come to the US, and is this related to your startup Modibo?
Yes. I'm looking for h one b visa.
Are there any hard deadlines you're working with - like when you need to be in the US, or any application deadlines coming up?
Yeah. I would love to be in The US.
Next this coming Wednesday.
That's just a few days away. Have you already started working with an immigration attorney, or filed any applications for the H-1B visa?
No.

I need to let you know that getting to the US by Wednesday with an H-1B visa isn't possible - H-1B applications take many months and have specific filing periods. How is this timeline affecting your company Modibo right now?
Not much.
What would the ideal outcome look like for you - what do you ultimately want to achieve with US immigration for yourself and your company?
I want to hire developers from US.
Have you had any previous visa denials, overstays, or other immigration issues with any country that I should know about?
No.

Thank you - I have everything I need to prepare a full brief for your immigration attorney. Give me just a moment.
